name: StandaloneConfigSetDefault
title: StandaloneConfigSetDefault
description: Changes the default configuration file, i.e. the standalone configuration to be loaded when standalone mode is activated or the runtime kernel is started after reboot. Thus, it results in a persistent change on the VN8900.

parameters.name: rtcfgFileName
parameters.description: Name of the standalone configuration file (without path) to be set as default configuration file.

return: The function returns an error code with 0 representing successful operation.
